outfit_info.outfit_description: This outfit blends urban practicality with a relaxed aesthetic. A dark puffer jacket provides substantial warmth over a vibrant blue tee, paired with oversized light-colored jeans. Chunky sneakers complete this comfortable, contemporary look, ideal for cold weather outings, offering both style and coziness.

model_attributes.body: The model displays a lean and athletic physique, conveying a casual and effortless confidence.
model_attributes.pose: Standing with one hand casually in a pocket, the model presents a relaxed and natural posture.
model_attributes.background: A clean, minimalist light gray background highlights the outfit without any distractions.
